title: glyceria fluitans var. declinata
intro: Glyceria fluitans var. declinata, also known as Declining mannagrass, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant is used in traditional herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Glyceria fluitans var. declinata include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
